item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables that you can combine with a protein of your choice to create your own meal salad.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Fish cakes with dill potatoes tossed in butter, topped with flash-fried pointed cabbage. With remoulade and lemon. (1+2+3+6+11)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Pork neck Marbella with mashed potato and red wine sauce, topped with a light, fresh salad. With green olives and prune compote. (6+11+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Celeriac Marbella with mashed potato and red wine sauce, topped with a light, fresh salad. With green olives and prune compote. (6+10+11+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Breaded fish fillet with crispy roasted potatoes, served with classic sauce tartare and fresh lemon. (1+2+3+6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Finely sliced vegetables, breaded and fried, served with crispy roasted potatoes and sauce tartare. (1+2+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Asian-inspired pork roast with crisp crackling, marinated in hoisin. Served with jasmine rice and a salad of pickled carrot, daikon and fresh pointed cabbage. (1+7+8) GREEN DISH: dish Tofu marinated in hoisin, served with jasmine rice and a salad of pickled carrot, daikon and fresh pointed cabbage. (1+7+8)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Beef kebab tossed with mushrooms and onion, served with pita and sesame-roasted potatoes. Served with garlic dressing, smoked chilli sauce, hummus, red onion in sumac and a cabbage salad with tomato and cucumber. (1+8+11+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Kebab-spiced roasted cauliflower, served with pita and sesame-roasted potatoes. Served with garlic dressing, smoked chilli sauce, hummus, red onion in sumac and a cabbage salad with tomato and cucumber. (1+8+11+13+15)
